series_metadata.series_title: Completed Tax Clearance Checks and Statements of Condition
series_metadata.series_description: Includes Development Services Agency tax clearance checks for credit, grants and loans that have been completed, Medical Marijuana Compliance Program tax clearance checks for issuance of licenses that have been completed, and other Statements of Condition that are completed pursuant to taxpayer requests.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: from date of issuance. ; Electronic: from date of issuance
